Name: -1_art_shows_fashion_similar
Representative_Docs: ["I would like to acknowledge that there are shows that I watch that are not 'art.' However, I recognize that they are not art. The shows that do transcend the medium and are critically and artistically acknowledged, are considered 'good taste.' Those who enjoy these shows are showing they have good taste.", 'When someone has good taste, in my opinion, their interests in art are similar to my own, or what I consider good.', "What I mean by that is they have a taste similar to mine or one I can appreciate. People who enjoy the same type of books or movies or art.  Though I can understand someone may have exceptional taste and I don't agree with it.  Such as enjoying Rothko's art or Wharton's novels."]

Name: 0_say_mean_usually_quality
Representative_Docs: ["When I say that someone has good taste, I generally mean that I can see value and positive qualities in the art/music/literature that they like, even if I don't enjoy it myself.  However I must admit that much of the time, when I say that someone has good taste, it means that they share my taste, i.e. they admire the art/music/literature that I myself enjoy.", 'When I say that someone has good taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is similar to what I like, so, therefore, they have good taste.', "Someone has a good taste in something when they're perceived to like something similar to myself. We see 'good taste' in a certain subject as something that we also enjoy. For example, I would say someone has a good taste in food if I perceive that they like similar foods to me. Having a good taste is subjective and aligns closely with my values."]

Name: 1_appreciate_choices_appealing_look
Representative_Docs: ['I think that they make good, stylish choices based on the type of aesthetic that I myself appreciate. They also think in creative ways that complement their choices as a whole.', "They appreciate things like the writing style, colors and shades, and the way they work together. They don't often go for the gaudy or obvious but appreciate the subtleties of art.", 'That their preference of music, art, clothing, movies, etc. is appealing, interesting, fun, exciting, likeable, good to look at or enjoy, or just appealing in every way.']
